title: S8 - Improver Probe: tappable AskUserQuestion in the chat

beats.caption: AC1 - The probe renders tappable option buttons
beats.expectedScreen: the 'Did that go well?' question block with tappable option buttons in the chat

beats.caption: AC2 - Tapping an option locks the buttons and posts the choice
beats.expectedScreen: the chosen option 'Went well' highlighted and disabled, shown as the user's message

beats.caption: AC3 - The Other affordance reveals a free-text input
beats.expectedScreen: a free-text input with placeholder 'Type your answer' revealed after tapping Other
